User.title: User Profile
User.description: Represents a registered user profile, tracking their onboarding role and core meta info.

email.description: User email address matching their Firebase Auth credentials.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the profile was generated.

role.description: The workspace setup role. If null, the user has not completed role selection.

onboardingComplete.description: Whether the user completed onboarding steps.

CandidateProfile.title: Candidate Profile
CandidateProfile.description: Represents a comprehensive candidate profile with experience, education, projects, and social validation details.

uid.description: User ID matching the Firebase Auth UID.

basics.description: Basic info containing photo URL, full name, headline, location, experience years and employment status.

verification.description: GitHub verification status and portfolio url links.

onboardingStep.description: The onboarding step last completed, ranging 1-5.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the candidate profile was last updated.

/users/{userId}.description: Primary user configuration records keyed by Firebase Auth unique UID.

/candidateProfiles/{userId}.description: Durable candidate profiles containing career history, skills, and portfolio detail.
